name: UNRWA
mission: UNRWA USA lifts up the voices, experiences, and humanity of Palestine refugees to secure American support for resources essential to every human being, for the promise of a better life.
theoryOfChange: UNRWA USA has a published strategic framework titled "Transformation 2027: UNRWA USA Strategic Plan 2024-2026." This document outlines their vision, mission, and core values, along with strategic objectives and sub-objectives across four areas: Narrative Transformation, Programs, Operations, and Financial Sustainability. For example, under 'Programs,' an objective is to "Establish a credible reputation as innovators to improve Palestine refugee lives," with a sub-objective to "Demonstrate rigor in program delivery and results."

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: With a GMG score of 82/100, UNRWA USA demonstrates strong financial health and a direct-service impact model that resonates with donors seeking high-urgency humanitarian alignment.
areas_for_improvement: Working capital reserves are currently at 3.9 months, which is below the ideal six-month benchmark for long-term stability
High dependence on humanitarian urgency which can lead to volatile year-over-year revenue needs

dimension_explanations.alignment: UNRWA USA shows high alignment for Muslim donors as a Zakat-eligible entity that distributes funds according to specific asnaf categories [2]. The cause is categorized as high-urgency humanitarian relief, and the organization maintains a strong track record of lifting up the voices of Palestine refugees [2][8]. The organization's financial stability is supported by 3.9 months of working capital [1].
dimension_explanations.impact: The organization achieves high impact through direct service delivery, including food parcels, university scholarships, and mental health support [6][7]. Its financial efficiency is notable, with a total revenue of $51,495,126 and a program expense ratio of 93.4% [1][3]. While the cost per beneficiary is calculated at 466088.27, the direct nature of their interventions in education and emergency relief provides clear evidence of effectiveness [4][5].

baseline_narrative.headline: UNRWA USA National Committee provides critical humanitarian relief and long-term development to Palestine refugees through high-impact education and food assistance programs.
strengths: Exceptional program expense ratio of 93.4%, ensuring the vast majority of funds reach those in need
High fundraising efficiency with a cost of only $0.03 per $1 raised
Verified Zakat-eligible programs that adhere to Islamic giving principles
baseline_narrative.summary: UNRWA USA is a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the human development of Palestine refugees until a just solution to their plight is achieved [2][4]. The organization maintains a high level of financial transparency and accountability, earning a Charity Navigator score of 95.5/100 [1].

Focus is on immediate relief and human development rather than advocacy

strengths.detail: The organization maintains a <cite id="1">93.4% program expense ratio</cite> and a <cite id="1">fundraising efficiency of $0.03 per $1 raised</cite>, maximizing the impact of every dollar.
UNRWA USA offers <cite id="2">verified zakat-eligible programs</cite> that specifically serve the <cite id="2">fuqara (poor) and masakin (needy)</cite> among Palestine refugees.
The charity holds a <cite id="14">Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid</cite> and features a <cite id="1">93.4% independent board of directors</cite>.

strengths_deep_dive: UNRWA USA's operational strength is rooted in its lean financial model and robust governance. With an <cite id="1">Accountability & Finance score of 95</cite> from Charity Navigator, the organization demonstrates high standards of fiscal responsibility. Their impact is quantifiable through specific outputs, such as <cite id="6">repairing 68 shelters</cite> and providing <cite id="7">mental health support</cite> to vulnerable populations in conflict zones. The organization's ability to scale rapidly is evidenced by its <cite id="12">revenue growth from $7 million in 2021 to over $32 million in 2023</cite>, allowing it to meet escalating demands for emergency food and medical aid.
rich_narrative.summary: UNRWA USA National Committee serves as a critical lifeline for Palestine refugees, facilitating humanitarian relief and long-term development through a model of high financial efficiency. The organization reported <cite id="3">$32,433,934 in total revenue</cite> for the 2023 tax year, representing a massive <cite id="12">3-year revenue CAGR of 113.8%</cite> driven by urgent humanitarian needs. UNRWA USA is distinguished by its <cite id="1">overall score of 95.95.5/100 from Charity Navigator</cite>, reflecting its commitment to accountability and transparency. Their operations focus on five core pillars: <cite id="13">education, food assistance, health, protection, and emergency response</cite> across the Gaza Strip, West Bank, Jordan, Lebanon, and Syria. In 2023 alone, the organization successfully delivered <cite id="6">35,919 food parcels</cite> and provided <cite id="6">100 university scholarships</cite> to refugee students. Financial stewardship is a hallmark of the organization, which maintains a <cite id="1">program expense ratio of 93.4%</cite> according to recent filings, ensuring that public contributions are directed toward direct service delivery rather than administrative overhead. This efficiency is further evidenced by a <cite id="1">fundraising efficiency of $0.03 per $1 raised</cite>, significantly outperforming industry standards.
